title: Department of Sociology - Student Opinions
content:
Department of Sociology - Student Opinions

“Sociology department has become a department that I started with prejudice but it became a period that I do not want to complete.  Particularly, my department teachers made great contributions in determining the ideas of the students during the education process. By transferring the real knowledge of the society, the department's courses helped us develop ideas and be creative in life. As a sociologist candidate, we have the ability to handle and interpret events from a different perspective.”

Aysun Meşe

"I am Rümeysa, a 3rd year sociology student at Istanbul Esenyurt University. Our school supports the development of students with its academic staff and the opportunities it provides in different fields such as double major and Erasmus. The one-to-one attention of our professors towards us who are competent in their fields, and their pleasure of explaining the lessons increase our bond with the department. We develop our ability to look at events from a sociological perspective and to think critically, thanks to the discussions we have on social issues in the lessons. I am happy to be a student at the Department of Sociology in our school."

Rümeysa

"Istanbul Esenyurt University Department of Sociology aims to present the place of sociology in the social structure to students with various ideas and schools. In doing so, it provides a broad perspective on how current events are shaping current society. Directing the student to research and activities allows the student to  expand their knowledge in this department."

Eva Çözgen

This content was updated on 15/09/2024.
